name: Heavyweight Crewneck Tee
description: Cut from 240gsm combed cotton for a soft, structured drape that holds its shape wash after wash. A wardrobe staple built for every season.

name: Relaxed Overshirt Jacket
description: A brushed cotton-twill overshirt with a relaxed body and dropped shoulder. Layer it open over tees or button it up as a light jacket.

name: Marled Knit Sweater
description: A flecked wool-blend knit with a ribbed collar and hem. Warm without the bulk, made for layering into the colder months.

name: Waxed Field Jacket
description: Weatherproof waxed cotton with a corduroy collar and brass hardware. Built for long days outside, styled for everywhere else.

name: Straight Leg Denim
description: Rigid selvedge denim in a classic straight cut. Breaks in beautifully, fading exactly where you wear it most.

name: Pleated Wool Trouser
description: A soft wool-blend trouser with a single pleat and tapered leg. Dresses up a tee or dresses down a blazer with equal ease.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
description: Heavy 16oz canvas with reinforced stitching and leather straps. Fits a laptop, a market run, or a weekend away.

name: Suede Chelsea Boot
description: A classic Chelsea silhouette in soft suede with a stacked leather heel and elastic gusset. Built to be worn in daily.

name: Ribbed Beanie
description: A tight-ribbed merino wool beanie with a folded cuff. One size, unlined, made to layer under a hood.

name: Linen Blend Shirt
description: A breathable linen-cotton weave with a relaxed collar and single chest pocket. Light enough for warm days, textured enough to layer.

name: Leather Card Wallet
description: Full-grain leather in a slim bifold cut. Develops a rich patina with use, holds four cards and folded bills.

name: Low Top Leather Sneaker
description: Minimal leather sneaker on a cupsole base. Clean lines and a neutral palette make it an everyday default.
